creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
> With the switch of GCC_DEFAULT to GCC 12 pending, it's probably now a good idea to also consider that?

Sure, I agree. Moreover, if I patch GCC 12 before the next exp-run for GCC_DEFAULT update, we will get a full exp-run for this change too.

> Building the port mentioned in comment #4 here could be a good test, though.

I will do it before committing the change.

> Are you then planning to submit this upstream, too? Essentially share
the patch with gcc-patches@gcc.gnu.org (with a GNU ChangeLog). I can
help with that.

Yes, I am planning to share with upstream assuming everything goes as expected. And your help is most welcome.
